name: Crockpot Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from brisket.
2. Heat oil in a large frying pan. Brown brisket on all sides over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Place carrots, onion, and potatoes in the crockpot.
4. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
5. Add browned brisket to the crockpot.
6. Combine wine and remaining ingredients (mustard, thyme, rosemary, salt, garlic, bay leaf) in a bowl.
7. Pour the mixture over the brisket.
8. Cover with lid and cook on High for 4 1/2 to 5 hours or on Low for 8 hours. The tapioca will thicken the liquid to make its own gravy.
